problem_text_cn:
3-25 在一水平面上有两根相互平行的固定导轨$M_{1}N_{1}$和$M_{2}N_{2}$，质量$m_{1}$的物块$P_{1}$穿在$M_{1}N_{1}$上，质量$m_{2}$的物块$P_{2}$穿在$M_{2}N_{2}$上，$P_{1}$与$P_{2}$间用一根不可伸长的轻绳连接，开始时绳处于松弛状态。今使$P_{1}$获得沿导轨方向速度$v_{0}$，$P_{2}$静止，如图3-30所示。设系统处处无摩擦，$P_{1}$运动一段时间后绳被拉直，其内产生拉力，同时使导轨与相应的物块间有力的作用，这些力的作用时间$\Delta t$非常短。试就下述两种情况，计算$\Delta t$刚结束时$P_{1}$和$P_{2}$运动速度$u_{1}$和$u_{2}$。
(1) 绳的作用不损耗系统动能；
(2) 绳的作用使$P_{1}$和$P_{2}$沿绳长方向的速度相同。
problem_text_en:
3-25 On a horizontal plane, there are two fixed parallel rails $M_{1}N_{1}$ and $M_{2}N_{2}$. Block $P_{1}$ of mass $m_{1}$ slides on $M_{1}N_{1}$, and block $P_{2}$ of mass $m_{2}$ slides on $M_{2}N_{2}$. $P_{1}$ and $P_{2}$ are connected by an inextensible light string, initially slack. Give $P_{1}$ a velocity $v_{0}$ along the rail, while $P_{2}$ is at rest, as shown in Figure 3-30. Assume the system is frictionless everywhere. After a while, the string becomes taut, generating tension; simultaneously, forces act between the rails and the corresponding blocks. The duration $\Delta t$ of these forces is very short. For the following two cases, determine the velocities $u_{1}$ and $u_{2}$ of $P_{1}$ and $P_{2}$ just after $\Delta t$ ends.
(1) The action of the string does not dissipate the system’s kinetic energy.
(2) The action of the string makes the velocities of $P_{1}$ and $P_{2}$ along the length of the string equal.
problem_solution_cn:
解 系统沿导轨方向无外力，该方向动量守恒式为

$$ m_{1}u_{1}+m_{2}u_{2}=m_{1}v_{0} $$

(1) 绳的作用不损耗系统动能(类弹性碰撞)。可补充方程

$$ \frac{1}{2}m_{1}u_{1}^{2}+\frac{1}{2}m_{2}u_{2}^{2}=\frac{1}{2}m_{1}v_{0}^{2} $$

得第1组解为

$$ u_{1}=v_{0},\quad u_{2}=0, $$

对应的是绳伸直前的初态。绳伸直后的末态不可能有此解，否则绳将被拉长。第2组解为

$$ u_{1}=\frac{m_{1}-m_{2}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0},\quad u_{2}=\frac{2m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0}, $$

对应真实的末态。有三种可能的情况：

$$ m_{1}>m_{2}:\quad u_{1}>0,\quad u_{2}>u_{1}\quad(\text{绳又将松弛}), $$

$$ m_{1}=m_{2}:\quad u_{1}=0,\quad u_{2}=v_{0}\quad(P_{1}\text{与}P_{2}\text{交换速度}), $$

$$ m_{1}<m_{2}:\quad u_{1}<0,\quad u_{2}>0\quad(P_{1}\text{左行},P_{2}\text{右行},\text{绳又将松弛}). $$

(2) 绳的作用使$P_{1}$，$P_{2}$沿绳长方向的速度相同(类完全非弹性碰撞)。可补充方程

$$ u_{1}\cos\phi=u_{2}\cos\phi, $$

$\phi$为拉直的绳与导轨间的夹角。解得

$$ u_{1}=u_{2}=\frac{m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0}, $$

这一末态解意味着绳一旦伸直便不再回缩。
problem_solution_en:
Solution There is no external force along the rail direction, so momentum is conserved:

$$ m_{1}u_{1}+m_{2}u_{2}=m_{1}v_{0} $$

(1) The action of the string does not dissipate kinetic energy (elastic‑collision‑like). The additional equation is

$$ \frac{1}{2}m_{1}u_{1}^{2}+\frac{1}{2}m_{2}u_{2}^{2}=\frac{1}{2}m_{1}v_{0}^{2} $$

The first set of solutions is

$$ u_{1}=v_{0},\quad u_{2}=0, $$

which corresponds to the initial state before the string becomes taut. This set cannot be the final state after the string becomes taut, because the string would then be stretched. The second set of solutions is

$$ u_{1}=\frac{m_{1}-m_{2}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0},\quad u_{2}=\frac{2m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0}, $$

which corresponds to the actual final state. There are three possible cases:

$$ m_{1}>m_{2}:\quad u_{1}>0,\quad u_{2}>u_{1}\quad(\text{the string will become slack again}), $$

$$ m_{1}=m_{2}:\quad u_{1}=0,\quad u_{2}=v_{0}\quad(P_{1}\text{ and }P_{2}\text{ exchange velocities}), $$

$$ m_{1}<m_{2}:\quad u_{1}<0,\quad u_{2}>0\quad(P_{1}\text{ moves left},P_{2}\text{ moves right},\text{ the string will become slack again}). $$

(2) The action of the string makes the velocities of $P_{1}$ and $P_{2}$ along the string equal (completely inelastic‑collision‑like). The additional equation is

$$ u_{1}\cos\phi=u_{2}\cos\phi, $$

where $\phi$ is the angle between the taut string and the rail. Solving gives

$$ u_{1}=u_{2}=\frac{m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}v_{0}, $$

This final‑state solution means the string, once taut, will not slacken again.
img_cn: 这是一道关于两物块与轻绳碰撞的物理题。题目描述了在光滑水平面上，物块$P_1$以速度$v_0$运动，物块$P_2$静止，两者由松弛的轻绳连接。绳被拉直后，在极短时间内产生相互作用。求解两种情况下绳刚拉直后两物块的速度$u_1$、$u_2$。图片背景为白色，文字为黑色，包含题目描述、示意图、解答过程。解答中使用了动量守恒、能量守恒等物理原理，并讨论了不同质量比下的可能结果。
img_en: This is a physics problem concerning the collision of two blocks connected by a light string. The problem describes block $P_1$ moving with speed $v_0$ on a smooth horizontal surface, block $P_2$ at rest, connected by a slack light string. After the string becomes taut, interactions occur within a very short time. The problem asks for the velocities $u_1$ and $u_2$ of the two blocks immediately after the string becomes taut, under two different conditions. The image has a white background with black text, containing the problem statement, a schematic diagram, and the solution process. The solution uses physical principles such as momentum conservation and energy conservation, and discusses possible outcomes under different mass ratios.
